MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-18-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HODGE, MARCUS D

DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DOUGLAS ROBBINS; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.
ORDER - STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR MOTION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $480.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT MARCUS D. HODGE. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,000.00 IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raymond Fong, of Office of the District Attorney, Tel. 415.734.3120, for petitioners and moving party;
Marcus Hodge, pro per, Tel. 510.776.9127, for respondent and opposing party;
No other appearances.

RULING: Parties stipulate to dismiss motion. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is dismissed without prejudice pursuant to stipulation of the parties. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
